description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a lush, tree-lined lot, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is surrounded by dense greenery, with a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. The facade is composed of large glass windows and a mix of white and natural wood paneling, giving it a contemporary aesthetic. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back and integrated into the landscape. The property is enclosed by mature trees, providing privacy and a natural buffer from the surroundings. The overall impression is of a secluded, upscale residence blending modern architecture with abundant landscaping.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and wood paneling, nestled within dense, mature trees and accessed by a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the prominent glass and wood facade framed by dense trees.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the thick tree line, with the house barely visible behind the foliage.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back of the bungalow and the continuation of the driveway, with the house partially obscured by trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the house mostly hidden by a continuous row of trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
